goal: is_continuous[X, Y](f) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { Y.is_open(x0) implies X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Y, X](f)
function(x0: Set[Y]) { not Y.is_open(x0) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }(c.c)

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, c.c) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, c).c

proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { T0.is_open(x0.c) = is_closed[T0](x0) }[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, c))

goal: is_continuous[X, Y](f) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { Y.is_open(x0) implies X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Y, X](f)
function(x0: Set[Y]) { not is_closed[Y](x0) or is_closed[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }(v.c)

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, v.c) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, v).c

proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { T0.is_open(x0.c) = is_closed[T0](x0) }[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, v).c)

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, v).c.c = set_preimage[X, Y](f, v)

proof: let w0: Set[Y] satisfy { Y.is_open(w0) and not X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, w0)) }
function(x0: Set[Y]) { not Y.is_open(x0) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }(w0)
